ofm.title: OnlyMonster has become the dominant OFM platform
ofm.summary: — pioneers in AI-assisted OFM workflow, achieved massive growth purely through product without marketing. OnlyMonster.ai

ofm.title: Fanvue hit $100M run rate
ofm.summary: and raised $22M Series A (Jan 2026). 20,000 new creators joined last month. Platform takes 20% fee on $12.50 average subscription. https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260112458975/en/

ofm.title: AI influencers are pulling $10K-50K/month
ofm.summary: with virtual personas. AI-tagged OFM/Fansly accounts with 1,000+ subscribers generate $10-20/month per user at scale. https://kgabeci.medium.com/the-ai-influencer-business-model-e2bfa08c5895

ofm.title: AI can now fully operate OFM accounts
ofm.summary: in 2026 when agencies implement correctly and stay transparent — Supercreator and others delivering end-to-end AI chat/CRM. https://sozee.ai/resources/ai-powered-onlyfans-agency-software/

ofm.title: OnlyFans is cracking down on AI/deepfakes
ofm.summary: — detection tools active, policy enforcement ramping. Opportunity for compliant AI-assisted (not AI-replacement) workflows. https://www.sirency.com/blog/onlyfans-policy-updates-2026-ai-deepfakes-and-rules

tools.title: OpenClaw v2026.3.7-beta.1

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.2.26
tools.summary: delivered secrets system, browser control, multi-DM, Android support, PDF tool. Moving from "cool demo" to daily ops infrastructure. https://www.reddit.com/r/OpenClawUseCases/comments/1rjhlac/

tools.title: Claude Code enterprise workflows
tools.summary: now standard: natural language → decomposed tasks → automated implementation. Can navigate large codebases, fix issues, automate repetitive dev work. https://henriquesd.medium.com/claude-code-a-practical-guide-to-automating-your-development-workflow-675714db08ed

tools.title: Awesome Claude Code repo
tools.summary: curates skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators. Growing ecosystem for reusable agent capabilities. https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code

tools.title: Claude Cowork / agent frameworks
tools.summary: emerging for end-to-end delegation — JSON-driven multi-agent cadence teams with CLI orchestration. https://github.com/catlog22/Claude-Code-Workflow

market.title: Puerto Escondido rental market
market.summary: enters 2026 with strong fundamentals: growing international/domestic demand, improved infrastructure, diversifying guest base supporting year-round occupancy. https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-rental-market-analysis-2026-occupancy-trends-investment-outlook

market.title: Puerto Escondido Airport expansion
market.summary: — additional Canadian and US connections in planning for 2026. Direct flight access historically drives dramatic property value surges (Cabo/Puerto Vallarta pattern). https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-airport-how-proximity-is-reshaping-the-local-real-estate-market

market.title: Rammed earth construction advancing
market.summary: — robotic ramming with digitally controlled compaction now viable. Design-to-fabrication workflow via Rhino/Grasshopper. Earth USA 2026 conference Sept 18-20 Santa Fe. https://eartharchitecture.org/?m=202603

market.title: Tulum ATV rental market saturated
market.summary: — multiple competitors (Tulum ATV Rental, Rentals La Veleta, others) competing on price. The Lagoon Company positioned well but differentiation critical. https://www.tulumatvrental.com/

market.title: Prefabricated rammed earth blocks
market.summary: emerging — factory-cast blocks reduce construction time/cost while maintaining quality. Relevant for CRETE project scalability. https://archello.com/news/detail-rammed-earth-walls-of-casa-ballena-los-cabos
